title: Context Menu
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Context Menu wrapper composed from the local Base UI Context Menu primitive, local class canonicalization, local SVG check/chevron icons, deterministic slots, and static examples for every dossier-listed Context Menu demo.

registry.reason: shadcn Context Menu composes the local Base UI Context Menu primitive.
shadcn Context Menu uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Context Menu style options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Context Menu implementation.
Origin check, chevron, and demo icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in this batch.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.

examples.title: ContextMenuBasic
examples.description: Basic browser context menu with a disabled Forward item.

examples.title: ContextMenuCheckboxes
examples.description: Checkbox context menu items with model-owned checked state.

examples.title: ContextMenuDemo
examples.description: Default browser context menu with shortcuts, submenu, checkbox items, and radio items.

examples.title: ContextMenuDestructive
examples.description: Context menu with destructive item styling.

examples.title: ContextMenuGroups
examples.description: Grouped context menu items with labels and shortcuts.

examples.title: ContextMenuIcons
examples.description: Context menu items with local icon slots.

examples.title: ContextMenuRadio
examples.description: Radio context menu items with model-owned selected values.

examples.title: ContextMenuRtl
examples.description: RTL context menu using local deterministic labels.

examples.title: ContextMenuShortcuts
examples.description: Context menu with keyboard shortcut slots.

examples.title: ContextMenuSides
examples.description: Context menu examples for top, right, bottom, and left placement attributes.

examples.title: ContextMenuSubmenu
examples.description: Nested submenu rendered with deterministic submenu placement attributes.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Context Menu attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Check, chevron, and demo icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. The local SVGs preserve icon slots and aria-hidden contracts.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local deterministic direction and labels instead of the origin app language selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector.

deviations.summary: Positioner, content, and submenu content expose side, align, offset, and context-point attributes without runtime DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not inside the shadcn render helper.
